reviews.review_text:
Really disappointed with the current state of Koveda Tasman Park.

Management fees keep going up, yet the maintenance and overall upkeep of the park just isn’t reflecting what we’re paying.
Lawns aren’t being properly maintained, shared areas are being neglected, boom gate still not working and basic services don’t seem to be delivered consistently.
On top of that, the poor condition of the park is now affecting property values — people are struggling to sell their cabins because of how the park is being maintained.
If fees are increasing, we deserve transparency and a clear improvement in standards — not the opposite.
Loved staying here.  Very comfortable, great views. Stayed in 66. Would stay again.
Easy transportation. Easy access to hurstville train station. Only 2 mins walk to hurstville station
Beautiful spot right in the river
Well managed and maintained, Manager very polite
Private residence for owners and family's
Love to stay there one day. Looks the piece.
